task.summary: Missing input validation for UserAgent parameter (CSRF)
task.description: Add CSRF token validation for UserAgent requests. Target cmd/main.go.

l1_result.llm_content:
{
  "edit_description": "Add CSRF token validation logic to check if the UserAgent contains a valid token before proceeding with requests.",
  "target_files": ["cmd/main.go"],
  "patch_commands": [
    "sed -i 's/validateUserAgent()/{validateUserAgent() && (\\1)}/' cmd/main.go",
    "sed -i 's/validateUserAgent()/{validateUserAgent() && (\\1)}/' cmd/main.go"
  ],
  "validation_commands": [
    "grep -q 'csrf\\|token\\|validate' cmd/main.go",
    "cat cmd/main.go | grep -c 'csrf'"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "Cmd/main.go now contains CSRF token validation logic for UserAgent requests.",
  "risk_notes": "Ensure the token format is consistent across all code files.",
  "follow_up_type": "needs_review"
}

parsed.edit_description: Add CSRF token validation logic to check if the UserAgent contains a valid token before proceeding with requests.
parsed.expected_outcome: Cmd/main.go now contains CSRF token validation logic for UserAgent requests.
